name: aguacate
description: AI meeting notes. No bot. No cloud.

scripts.clean:mac: rm -rf release/mac release/mac-arm64 release/Aguacate*.dmg release/Aguacate*.dmg.blockmap release/latest-mac.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:backend && npm run clean:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: echo 'WARNING: a local Windows build is NOT shippable — it contains no backend, because PyInstaller cannot cross-compile a Windows binary from macOS. The real, backend-complete installer is built on Windows by .github/workflows/build-windows.yml. Use this target only for frontend/packaging tests.' && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config.extraMetadata.version=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 | sed 's/^v//')
scripts.dist: npm run clean:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win --config.extraMetadata.version=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 | sed 's/^v//')

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aguacate needs microphone access to record your meetings.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Aguacate uses Apple Events to detect active calls.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Aguacate needs calendar access to detect upcoming meetings.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Aguacate needs screen recording permission to capture system audio from your meetings.
